mapper.select:
SELECT a.id, a.original_filename, a.filename, a.ext, a.size, a.object_key, a.file_source, a.equipment_id, a.source_file_md5, a.file_md5, a.create_user, a.create_time, a.is_encrypt, a.encrypt_key, a.encrypt_type, a.encrypt_len, CONCAT(b.storage_address,'/',b.bucket,'/',a.object_key) AS url, b.bucket AS bucket_name, CONCAT(b.bucket,'/',a.object_key) AS file_path FROM st_file a JOIN st_equipment b ON b.id = a.equipment_id AND b.is_deleted = 0
a.is_deleted = 0
AND a.id = #{id}
ORDER BY a.create_time DESC

SELECT a.id, a.original_filename, a.filename, a.ext, a.size, a.object_key, a.file_source, a.equipment_id, a.source_file_md5, a.file_md5, a.create_user, a.create_time, a.is_encrypt, a.encrypt_key, a.encrypt_type, a.encrypt_len FROM st_file a
a.is_deleted = 0
AND a.id IN
#{id}
ORDER BY a.create_time DESC

SELECT a."ID", a."ORIGINAL_FILENAME", a."FILENAME", a."EXT", a."SIZE", a."OBJECT_KEY", a."FILE_SOURCE", a."EQUIPMENT_ID", a."SOURCE_FILE_MD5", a."FILE_MD5", a."CREATE_USER", a."CREATE_TIME", a."IS_ENCRYPT", a."ENCRYPT_KEY", a."ENCRYPT_TYPE", a."ENCRYPT_LEN", (b."STORAGE_ADDRESS" || '/' || b."BUCKET" || '/' || a."OBJECT_KEY") AS url, b."BUCKET" AS bucket_name, (b."BUCKET" || '/' || a."OBJECT_KEY") AS file_path FROM st_file a JOIN st_equipment b ON b."ID" = a."EQUIPMENT_ID" AND b."IS_DELETED" = 0
a."IS_DELETED" = 0
AND a."ID" = #{id}
ORDER BY a."CREATE_TIME" DESC

SELECT a."ID", a."ORIGINAL_FILENAME", a."FILENAME", a."EXT", a."SIZE", a."OBJECT_KEY", a."FILE_SOURCE", a."EQUIPMENT_ID", a."SOURCE_FILE_MD5", a."FILE_MD5", a."CREATE_USER", a."CREATE_TIME", a."IS_ENCRYPT", a."ENCRYPT_KEY", a."ENCRYPT_TYPE", a."ENCRYPT_LEN" FROM st_file a
a."IS_DELETED" = 0
AND a."ID" IN #{id}
ORDER BY a."CREATE_TIME" DESC

SELECT a."ID", a."ORIGINAL_FILENAME", a."FILENAME", a."EXT", a."SIZE", a."OBJECT_KEY", a."FILE_SOURCE", a."EQUIPMENT_ID", a."SOURCE_FILE_MD5", a."FILE_MD5", a."CREATE_USER", a."CREATE_TIME", a."IS_ENCRYPT", a."ENCRYPT_KEY", a."ENCRYPT_TYPE", a."ENCRYPT_LEN", (b."STORAGE_ADDRESS" || '/' || b."BUCKET" || '/' || a."OBJECT_KEY") AS url, b."BUCKET" AS bucket_name, (b."BUCKET" || '/' || a."OBJECT_KEY") AS file_path FROM st_file a JOIN st_equipment b ON b."ID" = a."EQUIPMENT_ID" AND b."IS_DELETED" = 0 WHERE a."IS_DELETED" = 0
AND a."ID" IN
#{id}
ORDER BY
INSTR(#{orderStr}, ',' || TO_CHAR(a."ID") || ',')
